narrative:
Sherwood Village (precinct in Defiance County) has 489 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
